# tools/router_basemodel_allowlist.txt

# BaseModel subclasses. Generated by tools/lint_router_basemodel.py.
#
# Format: <relative path>:<ClassName>
#
# DO NOT add new entries. Migrate the type to packages/core-schema/
# and remove its line from this file. See packages/core-schema/README.md.
